CustomField.description: Populated with EnabledDateTime__c when the feature is currently active (Enabled has passed AND Disabled is null or still in the future); null otherwise. Mirrors the DH DateTime-toggle pattern — null = off, populated = on since X. Use ISBLANK(ActiveSinceDateTime__c) for boolean checks at the consumer.
CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK( EnabledDateTime__c )) && EnabledDateTime__c <= NOW() && (ISBLANK( DisabledDateTime__c ) || DisabledDateTime__c > NOW()), EnabledDateTime__c, NULL)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated: the timestamp at which the feature became active, or blank if the feature is not currently active.
CustomField.label: Active Since
